🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia reserves right to military action against Iran — Gulf state posture shift to offensive

🚢 Two vessels struck near Strait of Hormuz — maritime danger expanding to commercial shipping

🇺🇦 Ukraine strikes Russian aircraft sites 800km from border — deep strike capability

new: russia_ukraine: trump_deal_stalling (weight 3) — Kremlin says peace process fizzling as Trump focused on Iran
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz per AP — blockade is selective (US/Israeli ships banned only), not total closure. Iran easing on non-aligned nations. Putin-Trump call today yielded no Ukraine breakthrough. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active Mar 18-23. ME military escalation continues with IRGC announcing Gulf energy infrastructure attacks.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to 'massively blow up' Iran gas field if Iran attacks Qatar again
latest_news.text: Trump escalates rhetoric, threatens destruction of Iran's gas infrastructure. US claims 'no knowledge' of Israel's South Pars strike. Saudi Arabia reserves right to military action. Qatar expels Iran's military attachés.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted in aerial attack, Saudi Arabia threatens military action
latest_news.text: Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery on Red Sea hit. Saudi Arabia reserves right to military action against Tehran. Major escalation — Gulf state moves from defense to offensive posture.

latest_news.headline: Two vessels struck near Strait of Hormuz, ship burning off UAE coast
latest_news.text: Unknown projectile hits vessel off UAE east coast near Hormuz. Second vessel damaged off Qatar. Maritime danger expanding beyond military targets to commercial shipping.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine peace talks formally paused as Iran war consumes US attention
latest_news.text: US-Russia-Ukraine peace negotiations on hold due to Iran conflict. No resumption date. Russia benefits from oil price surge boosting war revenue.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine strikes Russian aircraft sites 800km from border, deep strike capability demonstrated
latest_news.text: Ukraine hits Russian military aircraft production and repair facilities deep inside Russia. Former pro-Kremlin operator calls for Putin to step down. Day 1,485 of war.

latest_news.headline: EU emergency summit on energy crisis — prices surge across Europe
latest_news.text: EU heads of state gather for emergency energy discussion. UK gas prices at 3-year high. Von der Leyen proposes 'tool box' of price control measures. Member states pessimistic.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 08:54 UTC) — (1) Saudi Arabia shifts to offensive posture against Iran — reserves military action; (2) Qatar expels Iranian diplomats — diplomatic break; (3) Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted; (4) Trump threatens to destroy Iran's gas fields; (5) Two vessels struck near Hormuz; (6) EU emergency energy summit; (7) Ukraine peace talks PAUSED due to Iran war; (8) Ukraine strikes Russian aircraft sites 800km deep; (9) Lebanon: 1M+ displaced, Beirut strikes intensify; (10) No ceasefire signals in any active theater.
